description_long: This object is a white virtual reality headset with a smooth, rounded exterior and a prominent head strap system for secure wearing. The front face features a printed logo and the text 'Virtual Reality Innovation Hub,' indicating its branding and likely institutional use. The headset has two visible camera or sensor ports on the front, which are typical for inside-out tracking in modern VR devices. The side views reveal adjustable straps and a slightly protruding section that houses internal electronics and optics. The rear view shows a Y-shaped strap configuration designed to cradle the back of the user's head for comfort and stability. The overall design is ergonomic, with a matte finish and minimal external controls, suggesting a focus on immersive, hands-free operation.
description: A white virtual reality headset with a printed logo, smooth rounded body, and adjustable head straps for secure, comfortable wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the logo, text, and two sensor/camera ports.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the adjustable strap and the headset's curved profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the Y-shaped head strap and the headset's ergonomic back support.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the strap attachment and side profile.
